notes: Snapshot of every tool description the agent loops expose to the model.
Each (workflow, toolName) maps to the description string + parameter schema as of extraction time.
Phase 1 GEPA optimizes the description fields here; the loops continue to use their inline copies until the GEPA-optimized values are wired back in.

search_guidelines.description: Search the WHO/MSF clinical guidelines knowledge base (58,984 chunks from 401 source documents). Returns graded evidence chunks ranked by clinical relevance. Issue ONE call per turn with a focused 3-6 word query, then wait for results before deciding the next query. Cover different aspects across turns: primary condition, treatment, dosing, contraindications, monitoring, special populations.

query.description: Clinical question or phrase, e.g. 'first-line treatment childhood malaria', 'TB preventive therapy HIV adults dosing'

format_cds_result.description: Emit the final structured CDS report after gathering sufficient KB evidence. Write a COMPREHENSIVE, DETAILED 5-section report. Every section must have at least 4 specific, grounded bullet points with citations.

summary.description: One-sentence clinical summary for the card header (max 140 chars)

content.description:
Full structured CDS report with EXACTLY 5 sections using ## headings. Each section MUST have at least 4 specific bullet points grounded in KB evidence.

## Clinical Assessment
[Patient presentation: age/sex, primary diagnosis, key vitals and flags, ALL active medications with doses, relevant history, current treatment status, what is NOT yet addressed — at least 4 detailed bullets]

## Evidence-Based Considerations
[Diagnosis (primary + differential), severity classification and criteria, pathophysiology relevant to management, special population factors (pregnancy/HIV/TB/paediatric/elderly), comorbidity interactions — at least 4 bullets, each with *(WHO/MSF: ...)* citation]

## Suggested Actions
[ALL treatment steps in priority order: immediate actions, drug name + EXACT dose + route + frequency + duration for EACH medication, investigations/workup with specific tests, monitoring parameters and frequency, referral criteria and destination — at least 6 bullets with citations]

## Safety Alerts
[Drug interactions, contraindications, dose adjustments for renal/hepatic/pregnancy, specific toxicity monitoring, traditional remedy interactions, high-risk populations warnings — at least 4 bullets with citations]

## Key Points
[Numbered list of the most critical clinical decisions and takeaways — at least 4 numbered items with citations]

search_guidelines.description: Search the WHO/MSF clinical guidelines knowledge base (58,984 chunks from 401 source documents). Returns graded evidence chunks ranked by clinical relevance. Issue ONE call per turn with a focused 3-6 word query, then wait for results before deciding the next query. Cover different aspects across turns: primary condition, treatment, dosing, contraindications, monitoring, special populations.

query.description: Clinical question or phrase, e.g. 'first-line treatment childhood malaria', 'TB preventive therapy HIV adults dosing'

search_guidelines.description: Search the WHO/MSF clinical guidelines knowledge base for information about a condition or treatment. Call multiple times with different queries to gather enough information for patient education.

query.description: Short specific query (3-7 words). Use condition + aspect, e.g. 'TB treatment completion importance', 'HIV ARV adherence side effects', 'hypertension pregnancy risk'

format_patient_material.description: Emit the final patient education material after gathering sufficient evidence from at least 4 search queries. Call this exactly once when all 7 sections can be filled with specific, grounded content.

title.description: Short title for the patient material e.g. 'Understanding Your Hypertension'

content.description:
Full patient education material with EXACTLY 7 sections using ## headings. Each section MUST have at least 4 bullet points of specific, actionable content.

## What You Have
[What the condition is, what causes it, what is happening in the body — in simple words]

## Why It Matters
[What happens if untreated or if medications are skipped — specific consequences, not vague]

## What To Do
[Numbered list of specific daily actions: diet, exercise, habits, checks, fluid intake]

## Your Medications
[For EACH medication: name, what it does in plain language, exact dose, timing, with/without food, how long to take, what to do if you miss a dose]

## What to Avoid
[Specific foods, drinks, substances, activities to avoid — with reasons. Include drug-food interactions. Mention traditional remedies that interfere.]

## Follow-Up Schedule
[When to return to the clinic, what will be checked, what to bring, how often for tests or measurements]

## When To Seek Help
[Bulleted list of specific warning signs that require urgent clinic visit or hospital]

search_ciel_concepts.description: Search CIEL for diagnosis, observation, or medication candidates. Use this before finalizing coded diagnoses or medications.

expand_ciel_concept.description: Inspect one CIEL concept bundle before accepting or rejecting it.

finalize_soap_note.description: Emit the final SOAP note and extracted items after CIEL searches have been reviewed. Call exactly once when ready.

search_ciel_seeds.description: Search CIEL for candidate concepts for a proposed form question. Gemma should call this repeatedly with refined phrases until it finds an answerable concept or decides to drop the question.

expand_ciel_concept.description: Inspect a CIEL concept's coded answers or set members before deciding whether it is appropriate for the form.

get_form_draft.description: Read the current draft basket and schema.

update_form_draft.description: Apply safe structured operations to the draft basket after CIEL concepts have been checked.

build_form_schema.description: Rebuild and validate the OpenMRS O3 schema from the basket after updates.

publish_form.description: Publish the draft to OpenMRS. Only use after the user explicitly confirms publish.

search_ciel_seeds.description: Search CIEL for candidate concepts. Refine until you find a Question/Finding/Test/Boolean/Coded concept that matches the user's filter intent.

expand_ciel_concept.description: Inspect a CIEL concept's answers / set members.

get_report_draft.description: Read the current spec and the last compiled query / result.

update_report_draft.description: Apply structured spec mutations (set_report_type, set_date_range, add_filter, remove_filter, set_join_mode, set_denominator, clear_denominator, add_group_by, remove_group_by, set_visualization).

build_report_query.description: Resolve dates, validate the spec, compile to a FHIR query plan.

run_report.description: Execute the compiled query against OpenMRS FHIR2 and store the result.
